title: Analytics - Help Guide Opened
scenario: Analytics event logged when user opens Help Guide page in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Navigate to the Help Guide page (e.g., via Settings → Help or Account → Help Guide).
Observe that the Help Guide page loads.
expected: A Firebase analytics event is logged when the Help Guide page is opened. The event includes default analytics elements: event count graphs, event counts by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
